DEADCELLS-ROLL.title: Roll

DEADCELLS-RUTHLESS.title: Ruthless
DEADCELLS-SADIST_STILETTO.title: Sadist's Stiletto

DEADCELLS-SYMMETRICAL_SPEAR.title: Symmetrical Lance

DEADCELLS-TOOTHPICK_THREE.title: Deliberate Heavy Blow

DEADCELLS-ALCHEMY_CARBINE.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
DEADCELLS-A_PLAN.description:
Discard all [gold]Skill[/gold] cards in your hand, then draw that many [gold]Attack[/gold] cards.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
DEADCELLS-ATTACK_DEFEND.description: Whenever you alternate between playing a [gold]Skill[/gold] and an [gold]Attack[/gold], add {AttackDefendPower:diff()} [gold]{AttackDefendPower:plural:Throwing Knife|Throwing Knives}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BACKTRACK.description: Shuffle your hand into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then draw that many cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BEGINNER_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-BLEEDING_SPREAD.description:
[gold]Bleeding[/gold] spreads to other enemies.
Whenever you apply [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply {BleedingSpreadPower:diff()} additional {BleedingSpreadPower:plural:stack|stacks}.
DEADCELLS-BLOODTHIRSTY_SHIELD.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Until the start of your next turn, whenever you take damage, apply {BloodthirstyShieldPower:diff()} [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-CLUSTER_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} fixed damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
DEADCELLS-COCOON.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card, gain {CocoonPower:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-CORROSIVE_CLOUD.description: Whenever you apply at least 3 [gold]Bleeding[/gold], apply {CorrosiveCloudPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] for every 3 [gold]Bleeding[/gold] applied.
DEADCELLS-CROW_BAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card you played this turn was a [gold]Skill[/gold], deal {DoubleDamage:diff()}x damage instead.
DEADCELLS-CROW_FEATHERS.description:
Gain [gold]Flight[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage back to the attacker. (Affected by Attack bonuses)
DEADCELLS-CURSED_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of each combat, shuffle a random [gold]Curse[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-DEPRAVED_FORM.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Your next {DepravedPower:plural:Attack deals|{DepravedPower:diff()} Attacks deal} 25% additional damage.
DEADCELLS-FERRYMAN_S_LANTERN.description:
Choose between [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Abyssal Drain+|Abyssal Drain}[/gold] and [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul Blast+|Soul Blast}[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Currently have {Ammunition:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold])|}
DEADCELLS-FERRYMAN_S_LANTERN_THREE.descr:
Consume ALL [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Whenever 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold] is consumed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
DEADCELLS-FIRE_BLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies X times.
DEADCELLS-FIREBRANDS.description: Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
DEADCELLS-FIRE_GRENADE.description:
Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-FLINT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold].
[gold]Charge[/gold]: Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-FRANTIC_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is 50% or less, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
DEADCELLS-FRONT_LINE_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Attack[/gold] cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-FROST_BLAST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] X times.
Apply {FrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to ALL enemies {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times.
DEADCELLS-GIANTKILLER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Deal {ToEliteDamage:diff()} additional damage to [gold]Elites[/gold] and [gold]Bosses[/gold].
([red]Changes effect each time it is played[/red])
DEADCELLS-GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage to all other enemies.
DEADCELLS-HATTORI_S_KATANA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
If this card does not cost 0, return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The next time it is played, it attacks 1 additional time (up to 5 times).
If this card hits at least 3 times, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
DEADCELLS-HAYABUSA_BOOTS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
The final hit deals damage to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-HAYABUSA_GAUNTLETS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
If the enemy's HP is 40% or less, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} additional times.
If this card does not cost 0, return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-HEMORRHAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Bleeding[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage instead.
Apply {BleedingPower:diff()} [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ICE_ARMOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]Block[/gold], gain {FixedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
Apply {FrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-ICE_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {FrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
Randomly discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
DEADCELLS-ICE_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {FrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-ICE_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, ALL enemies lose {IceShieldPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEADCELLS-IN_A_SIMILAR.description:
Play copies of the last {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} you played.
(Will not play [gold]Do It Again[/gold])
DEADCELLS-IN_TIME.description: Before your turn starts, if any enemy intends to attack, automatically play {InTimePower:diff()} [gold]{InTimePower:plural:Shield|Shields}[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-IRON_STAFF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, deal damage equal to your remaining [gold]Block[/gold] to ALL enemies{IronStaffPower:choose(1):| {} times}.
End your turn.
DEADCELLS-LACERATING_AURA.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, apply {LaceratingAuraPower:diff()} [gold]Bleeding[/gold].
DEADCELLS-LIGHTNING_BOLT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this is the first card you played this turn, or the last card you played was [gold]this card[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] and increase its damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
If you play [gold]this card[/gold] more than {Cards:diff()} times this turn, take damage equal to the number of times it was played.
DEADCELLS-MAGIC_MISSILES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
DEADCELLS-MAGNETIC_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
This turn, whenever an enemy takes damage, gain {MagneticPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-MULTIPLE_NOCKS_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Randomly discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
DEADCELLS-NIGHT_LIGHT.description: At the end of combat, gain an additional card reward.
DEADCELLS-OILED_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Burning[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
Apply {OilPower:diff()} [gold]Oil[/gold].
DEADCELLS-OIL_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {OilPower:diff()} [gold]Oil[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-PIANO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rhythm Bouzouki II+|Rhythm Bouzouki II}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-PIANO_TWO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card you played this turn was [gold]Rhythm Bouzouki[/gold], deal double damage instead.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rhythm Bouzouki III+|Rhythm Bouzouki III}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-PIANO_THREE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If the last card you played this turn was [gold]Rhythm Bouzouki[/gold] or [gold]Rhythm Bouzouki II[/gold], deal double damage instead.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Rhythm Bouzouki III+|Rhythm Bouzouki III}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-PUNISHMENT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Create and play {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards against a random enemy.
DEADCELLS-RAMPART.description:
Until next turn, you cannot take attack damage.
Discard all [gold]Skill[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-RECKLESS.description: Play {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them.
DEADCELLS-REGULAR_SKILL.description: At the start of your turn, add {RegularSkillPower:diff()} [gold]Roll[/gold] cards with [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ROB.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the end of combat, gain {RobPower:diff()} additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ROLL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Discard any [gold]Attack[/gold] cards drawn this way.
DEADCELLS-ROOT_GRENADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {ConstrictPower:diff()} [gold]Constricted[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-ROUNDING_KNIFE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Apply {BleedingPower:diff()} [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DEADCELLS-RUTHLESS.description: Every time you apply 2 debuffs to an enemy, draw {RuthlessPower:diff()} {RuthlessPower:plural:card|cards}.
DEADCELLS-SADIST_STILETTO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {RepeatTime:diff()} times.
For each unique debuff on the enemy, hit 1 additional time and increase the damage by 1.
DEADCELLS-SCYTHE_CLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Shuffle [gold]Right Scythe Claw[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-SCYTHE_CLAW_TWO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If at least {TargetDamage:diff()} unblocked damage is dealt, stun the enemy for 1 turn.
Shuffle [gold]Left Scythe Claw[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-SNAKE_FANGS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
If the enemy has at least 5 [gold]Poison[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
Put this card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-SONIC_CARBINE.description: The next {SCbPower:diff()} [gold]{SCbPower:plural:Attack card you draw is|Attack cards you draw are}[/gold] played automatically.
DEADCELLS-SOTF.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Choose to gain an additional {ExtraStrOrDex:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] or [gold]Dexterity[/gold].|}
DEADCELLS-SPEED.description: The next {SpeedPower:plural:time you play|{SpeedPower:diff()} times you play} a card, draw 1 additional card and gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
DEADCELLS-STRATEGY_STAGNATED.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Shuffle a [gold]Slow Down[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
DEADCELLS-SWIFT_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this is within the first {RoundNumber:diff()} {RoundNumber:plural:turn|turns} of combat, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
DEADCELLS-SYMMETRICAL_SPEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
If the first hit hits at least 2 enemies, the remaining hits deal double damage.
DEADCELLS-TOOTHPICK.description:
Choose between [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Light Hammer+|Light Hammer}[/gold], [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Deliberate Heavy Blow+|Deliberate Heavy Blow}[/gold], and [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Repair+|Repair}[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
([gold]Ammo[/gold]: {Ammunition:diff()}/1)|}
DEADCELLS-TOMBSTONE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], apply {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Kill enemies with at least as much [gold]Doom[/gold] as HP.
DEADCELLS-TORCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {BurnsPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold].
If the enemy already had [gold]Burning[/gold], apply {ExtraBurnsPower:diff()} additional {ExtraBurnsPower:plural:stack|stacks}.
DEADCELLS-VAMPIRISM.description:
Apply {BleedingPower:diff()} [gold]Bleeding[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Heal HP equal to the total [gold]Bleeding[/gold] on ALL enemies.
